# St4rtup

> St4rtup is a Sales & Marketing CRM designed specifically for startups. It includes pipeline management, marketing hub, AI agents, SEO tools, WhatsApp Business, and payment processing.

## What is St4rtup?
St4rtup is an all-in-one CRM for startup sales teams. It combines lead management, visual pipeline (Kanban), email tracking, marketing campaigns, SEO content generation with AI, WhatsApp Business integration, AI-powered calls, and Stripe payments — all in one platform designed for early-stage companies.

## Key Features
- Visual pipeline with drag-and-drop Kanban
- Marketing Hub with campaigns, funnels, and SEO Command Center
- 4 AI agents: lead scoring, BANT qualification, proposal generation, content SEO
- WhatsApp Business with AI chatbot
- AI Calls with Retell AI (batch queues, A/B testing, GDPR consent)
- 14 interactive graphs and dashboards
- Deal Room with PDF watermarking, page analytics, and NDA digital signing
- Stripe + PayPal payments
- i18n support (ES/EN/PT)
- 470+ API endpoints

## Pricing
- Starter: EUR 0/month — 1 user, 100 leads
- Growth: EUR 19/month — 3 users, 5000 leads, AI, marketing, SEO
- Scale: EUR 49/month — 10 users, unlimited leads, deal room, API

## Competitors
St4rtup competes with HubSpot, Pipedrive, and Salesforce. Unlike enterprise CRMs, St4rtup is designed for startups: simpler, cheaper, with AI built-in from day one.
